name: away_occupancy_override_cleared
description: Warm day: user manually overrides HVAC to heat at 14:00 (thermostat diverges). Override is confirmed at 14:10 (after 600s confirm window). At 15:00 user leaves (occupancy_away). The away transition must clear the manual override (Fix #220).
notes: Fix #220: before the fix, occupancy_away left manual_override_active=True after the user left,
causing classification to be suppressed on return. Fix: _handle_occupancy_away() calls
The simulator mirrors the fix (lines 905-906): _handle_occupancy_away() clears manual_override_active.
override_confirmed assertion is integration-track (Gap 3 not yet closed in simulator).
override_cleared and setback_applied at 15:00 are logic-track — the simulator correctly handles them.

events.note: Warm afternoon: indoor at comfort_cool=74F, HVAC holding cool.
Warm-day classification: HVAC cool at comfort_cool=74F.
User bumps thermostat to heat mode — override detection fires, 10-min confirm window starts.
10 minutes elapsed with thermostat still in heat — override confirmed, manual_override_active=True.
User leaves home while manual override is active. Away transition must clear override (Fix #220).

assertions.reason: Initial warm-day classification applied. P3: band [comfort_heat=70 / comfort_cool=74] armed.
P3: comfort band ceiling=comfort_cool=74F, floor=comfort_heat=70F armed at classification. Occupied+awake uses the full comfort band — no floor suppression.
600s confirm window elapsed with thermostat in heat mode — override confirmed, manual_override_active set True.
assertions.note: Requires Gap 3 (override confirmation delay) in simulate.py. Promoted to logic-track once Gap 3 is closed.

assertions.reason: occupancy_away transition clears manual override — Fix #220: _handle_occupancy_away() calls clear_manual_override(). Simulator state: manual_override_active=False after away.
Away setback applied after override cleared: setback_cool=79F on warm/cool day.

verdict.summary: Occupancy-away transition clears manual override then applies setback — Fix #220
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (74F) → override_confirmed (14:10) → override_cleared + setback_applied (79F) on away
verdict.expected_behavior: Leaving home while a manual override is active: override is cleared so classification resumes on return
